Off Calendar Aug-11-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT DAVID LEWIS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. It is far from clear that the burden of proof was shifted. Assuming it was, Dr. Afsari's declaration creates a triable issue of fact. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
